Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total: {len\(d\)}'\); [print\(f'  {r.get\(\\"symbol\\",\\"?\\"\):15} cluster={r.get\(\\"cluster_score\\"\)} quality_tier={r.get\(\\"quality_tier\\"\)} roce5y={r.get\(\\"roce_5yr_avg\\"\)} sector={r.get\(\\"sector\\"\)}'\) for r in d[:8] if r.get\('quality_tier'\)]")
